basic_details.job_title: Haryana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 (Rewari) - Apply Online for 454 Anganwadi Worker & Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Programme Officer, Women & Child Development, Rewari
basic_details.short_information: The Women and Child Development Department, District Rewari (Haryana) has invited online applications for 103 Anganwadi Karyakatri (Worker) and 351 Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) supplementary posts across the district's Anganwadi projects. These are temporary, honorarium-based posts, and only female candidates residing in the concerned Gram Panchayat or Ward are eligible. Online applications can be submitted from 20 July 2026 to 29 July 2026, till 5:00 PM.

application_fee.details: Not specified. No application fee details are mentioned in the source notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 42 years Cut-off date for age calculation: 1 July 2026 Special age relaxation: maximum age limit of 45 years applies to widows, divorced women, deserted women, and women whose husband has been sentenced to punishment or has 70% or more disability (based on a certificate issued by the Chief Medical Officer)

qualification.details: Only women candidates who are residents of the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward against which the post is vacant are eligible Permanent residency in the applicable Gram Panchayat/Ward (or urban area) is mandatory for all applicants | Anganwadi Karyakatri: Minimum qualification of Intermediate (12th); the merit list is prepared based on actual marks obtained in Matric. Additional marks are added for higher education as per rules (Graduate: 3 marks, Postgraduate: 5 marks) Anganwadi Sahayika: Minimum qualification of Matric (10th); the merit list is prepared based on actual marks obtained in Matric. Additional marks are added for higher education as per rules (12th/10+2: 3 marks, Graduate or equivalent: 5 marks)

salary_details.details: The posts are temporary and honorarium-based. The specific honorarium amount is not specified in this notification.

how_to_apply: Obtain full details of the vacant post, project, Gram Panchayat/Ward, and reservation from the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer's office, or the notice boards at WCDPO/District Programme Officer offices
Complete the online application form within the prescribed period
Ensure the residence and caste certificates used are Tehsil-issued, digitally signed, and online-verifiable
Submit the online application to the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer's office within the prescribed time window
Ensure the application is complete in all respects - incomplete applications will not be considered
Submit online applications between 20 July 2026 and 29 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM
important_instructions: Only online applications received within the prescribed time period at the office of the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer will be accepted; only online applications are valid Incomplete applications will not be considered The number of vacant posts shown in the table may increase, decrease, or change based on the department's status Selection of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Anganwadi Sahayika will be made by a departmentally constituted selection committee, based on the village- and ward-wise merit list Only women candidates belonging to the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward (urban area) are eligible; all applicants must be permanent residents of that Gram Panchayat/Ward

content_sections.heading: Rewari Anganwadi Recruitment Notification
content_sections.text: Full details of vacant posts by project, Gram Panchayat/Ward, reservation, and eligibility are available at the office of the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer, and are also displayed on the notice boards of all Women and Child Development Project Officer offices and the District Programme Officer office, Rewari. The notification reference number is 47265/HRY . Rewari Anganwadi Recruitment Notification PDF Here

rows.details: District Programme Officer, Women & Child Development, Rewari

content_sections.heading: Rewari Anganwadi Vacancy Details: Project-wise
content_sections.text: The department notes that the number of vacant posts shown above may increase, decrease, or otherwise change based on the departmental situation.

content_sections.heading: Rewari Anganwadi Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only women candidates who are residents of the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward against which the post is vacant are eligible Permanent residency in the applicable Gram Panchayat/Ward (or urban area) is mandatory for all applicants Anganwadi Karyakatri: Minimum qualification of Intermediate (12th); the merit list is prepared based on actual marks obtained in Matric. Additional marks are added for higher education as per rules (Graduate: 3 marks, Postgraduate: 5 marks) Anganwadi Sahayika: Minimum qualification of Matric (10th); the merit list is prepared based on actual marks obtained in Matric. Additional marks are added for higher education as per rules (12th/10+2: 3 marks, Graduate or equivalent: 5 marks)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 42 years Cut-off date for age calculation: 1 July 2026 Special age relaxation: maximum age limit of 45 years applies to widows, divorced women, deserted women, and women whose husband has been sentenced to punishment or has 70% or more disability (based on a certificate issued by the Chief Medical Officer)

content_sections.heading: Merit and Marking Scheme
content_sections.text: Selection of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Anganwadi Sahayika is made by a departmentally constituted selection committee, based on a village/ward-wise merit list. The merit list is built using the following marking components: Base qualification marks: Actual marks obtained in Matric (10th) for both posts Special category preference: Women falling under special categories (such as widow, divorced, or other women eligible under the prescribed rules) are given a special preference of 10 marks Experience marks (maximum 5 marks): 1 mark per year of prior work as an Anganwadi Karyakatri, Kendra Worker, or Anganwadi Sahayika - 1 year: 1 mark, 2 years: 2 marks, 3 years: 3 marks, 4 years: 4 marks, 5 years or more: 5 marks. No marks are given for experience of less than 1 year. Only experience certificates issued by the concerned WCDPO or DPO are considered valid Additional higher education marks (maximum 5 marks): For Anganwadi Karyakatri posts: Graduate qualification - 3 marks; Postgraduate qualification - 5 marks For Anganwadi Sahayika posts: 12th (10+2) qualification - 3 marks; Graduate or equivalent qualification - 5 marks

content_sections.heading: Remuneration
content_sections.text: The posts are temporary and honorarium-based. The specific honorarium amount is not specified in this notification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not specified. No application fee details are mentioned in the source notification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Residence certificate showing permanent residency in the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward Caste certificate, if applicable Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (Matric, and 12th/Graduate/Postgraduate as applicable, for higher-education marks) Experience certificate, issued only by the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer (WCDPO) or District Programme Officer (DPO), for candidates claiming experience marks Supporting proof for special category claims (e.g., widow, divorced, deserted status, husband's punishment/disability certificate from the Chief Medical Officer), where applicable Residence and caste certificates are accepted only if issued online with digital signature from the Tehsil and are online-verifiable.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Rewari Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Obtain full details of the vacant post, project, Gram Panchayat/Ward, and reservation from the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer's office, or the notice boards at WCDPO/District Programme Officer offices Complete the online application form within the prescribed period Ensure the residence and caste certificates used are Tehsil-issued, digitally signed, and online-verifiable Submit the online application to the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer's office within the prescribed time window Ensure the application is complete in all respects - incomplete applications will not be considered Submit online applications between 20 July 2026 and 29 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications received within the prescribed time period at the office of the concerned Women and Child Development Project Officer will be accepted; only online applications are valid Incomplete applications will not be considered The number of vacant posts shown in the table may increase, decrease, or change based on the department's status Selection of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Anganwadi Sahayika will be made by a departmentally constituted selection committee, based on the village- and ward-wise merit list Only women candidates belonging to the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward (urban area) are eligible; all applicants must be permanent residents of that Gram Panchayat/Ward

content_sections.heading: Rewari Anganwadi Worker & Helper Important Links

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi posts are vacant in Rewari district?
faq.answer: There are 454 vacant posts in total - 103 Anganwadi Karyakatri and 351 Anganwadi Sahayika, spread across 6 projects.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts in Rewari?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are permanent residents of the concerned Gram Panchayat/Ward against which the post is vacant can apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Rewari Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 29 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: Anganwadi Karyakatri requires a minimum of Intermediate (12th); Anganwadi Sahayika requires a minimum of Matric (10th).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Minimum 18 years and maximum 42 years as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026, with relaxation up to 45 years for widows, divorced or deserted women, and women whose husband has been imprisoned/punished or is 70% or more disabled.

faq.question: Q6. Is there a written exam for Anganwadi Karyakatri or Sahayika selection?
faq.answer: No written exam is mentioned. Selection is merit-list based, using marks from Matric qualification, additional higher-education marks, experience marks, and special category preference.

faq.question: Q7. How are experience marks counted for Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates get 1 mark per year of prior work as Anganwadi Karyakatri, Kendra Worker, or Sahayika, up to a maximum of 5 marks for 5 or more years. Experience of less than 1 year earns no marks, and only certificates issued by the WCDPO or DPO are valid.
